channel.title: Finance 新闻汇总 - Free News Agent
channel.description: Finance 分类的最新新闻汇总，由 Free News Agent 自动生成，Gemini AI 筛选优质内容。

item.title: US federal prosecutors scrutinise BlackRock private credit fund

item.title: Global bonds tumble on fears of inflation shock from Iran war
item.description: <![CDATA[Global bonds tumble on fears of inflation shock from Iran war]]>

item.title: Stocks and bonds get swept up in a selloff, as Trump’s China visit fails to pry open the Strait of Hormuz
item.description: <![CDATA[Stocks and bonds get swept up in a selloff, as Trump’s China visit fails to pry open the Strait of Hormuz]]>

item.title: Small financial group close to Trump family plots $200mn Venezuela Spac deal
item.description: <![CDATA[Small financial group close to Trump family plots $200mn Venezuela Spac deal]]>

item.title: Trump Fed nominees oppose terms of keeping Powell as temporary chair
item.description: <![CDATA[Trump Fed nominees oppose terms of keeping Powell as temporary chair]]>
